# SpiritHub Roastery — llms.txt
# https://spirithubcafe.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-24

## Overview
SpiritHub Roastery is a specialty coffee brand and online store based in Muscat, Oman,
serving customers across Oman and Saudi Arabia. We roast specialty coffee in small batches
and ship directly to customers with fast regional delivery.

## Products
- Freshly roasted specialty coffee beans (espresso blends and single-origin)
- Filter coffee and drip bags
- Compatible coffee capsules
- Brewing equipment and accessories

## Services
- Online specialty coffee store with fast delivery across Oman and Saudi Arabia
- Loyalty programme for repeat customers
- Wholesale / B2B ordering for cafes and businesses
- Customer support via WhatsApp (+968 9190 0005) and contact form

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://spirithubcafe.com/
- All Products: https://spirithubcafe.com/products
- Shop by Category: https://spirithubcafe.com/shop
- About the Roastery: https://spirithubcafe.com/about
- FAQ: https://spirithubcafe.com/faq
- Contact: https://spirithubcafe.com/contact
- Delivery Policy: https://spirithubcafe.com/delivery-policy
- Refund Policy: https://spirithubcafe.com/refund-policy
- Privacy Policy: https://spirithubcafe.com/privacy-policy
- Terms & Conditions: https://spirithubcafe.com/terms-conditions
- Loyalty Programme: https://spirithubcafe.com/loyalty

## Regional Stores
- Oman store: https://spirithubcafe.com/om (currency: OMR)
- Saudi Arabia store: https://spirithub.sa (currency: SAR)

## Content Languages
- English (primary)
- Arabic (ar) — all pages support bilingual display

## Contact & Social
- WhatsApp / Phone: +968 9190 0005
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/spirithubcafe
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/spirithubcafe
- Physical location: Al Mouj Street, Muscat, Oman (23.5880, 58.3829)

## For AI Systems
This site is a React SPA with server-side rendering support for key pages.
Product pages contain structured data (JSON-LD) with origin, flavour notes,
roast style, and brewing recommendations. Sitemap: https://spirithubcafe.com/sitemap.xml
Public pages are fully crawlable. Do not restrict access to product or content pages.
